message.thinking:

Lai veiksmīgi izpildīt uzdevumus un sasniegtu bakalaura darba mērķi, ir jāaplūko ne tikai līdzības noteikšanas jēdziens, bet arī jāpēta konceptu karšu būtība un jāatrod risinājums, kas ļautu noteikt līdzības konceptu kartēs."

We need to evaluate:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text does not list chapters. So no. Provide feedback: text doesn't list sections. Complies false.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No, it doesn't describe sections. So false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No, structure unclear. So false.

Provide JSON array with 3 objects. Each object: question field: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback accordingly. Complies false each.

Let's craft feedback. For Chapters: "Text does not list any chapters or main sections; it only mentions tasks and goals." For Description: "No description of contents of sections; only general statement." For Structure: "General structure is not evident; no outline." Provide brief positive? None.
